note: GENERIC ENGINE: by default the platform shows NO client name unless one is detected from the documents; nothing is hardcoded. For this demo we set suppress_client=true so the real client is never named on screen even though it appears in the docs (the detected name is then also scrubbed from doc-name citations and guarded against leaks). For a real engagement, omit suppress_client to auto-detect, or set an explicit "client". domain_label + effort numbers are optional.
